nasb.text: and prepare a savory dish for me such as I love, and bring it to me that I may eat, so that my soul may bless you before I die.”

esv.text: and prepare for me delicious food, such as I love, and bring it to me so that I may eat, that my soul may bless you before I die.”

cnv.text: 照我所喜歡的，給我預備美味的食物，拿來給我吃；好讓我在未死以前給你祝福。”

ccb.text: 照我喜欢的口味，做成美食给我吃，以便我在死前给你祝福。”

csbs.text: 你要照我所喜爱的，为我做成美食，拿来给我吃，好让我在死之前祝福你。”
